title: MoreGunpowders
description: A mod that adds more types of gunpowder
body:
This mod adds more types of gunpowder.

## New gunpowder types

### Unstable Gunpowder

- This randomly explodes when in your inventory. (~0.02 % per tick)
- Dropped by creepers 

### Enderpowder

- Randomly teleports you when in your inventory
- Dropped by endermen

### Compressed Gunpowder

- Allows you to store huge amounts of gunpowder
- crafted using 9 gunpowder

## New Blocks

### Ender TNT

- randomly teleports blocks around it when exploding

## Crafting reciepes

### Enderpowder

You can craft enderpowder by combining 4 gunpowder with one enderpearl, in a shape
like this:
```
(G = Gunpowder)
(E = Enderpearl)
[ G ]
[GEG]  => 8 Enderpowder
[ G ]
```

### Enderpearls

You can get one enderpearl by combining 1 enderpowder with 1 blaze powder.
